question: How many trash-filled balloons has North Korea sent into South Korea since May 2024?
answer: North Korea has sent hundreds of trash-filled balloons across the fortified border into South Korea since May 2024.
keypoints: North Korea has sent hundreds of trash-filled balloons across the fortified border into South Korea since May 2024.

question: How did South Korea's military respond to North Korea's balloon launches?
answer: South Korea's military resumed loudspeaker broadcasts aimed at North Korea in response to the balloon launches.
keypoints: South Korea's military resumed loudspeaker broadcasts aimed at North Korea in response to the balloon launches.
